title: Time2General: Learning Spatiotemporal Invariant Representations for Domain-Generalization Video Semantic Segmentation
summary: Domain Generalized Video Semantic Segmentation (DGVSS) is trained on a single labeled driving domain and is directly deployed on unseen domains without target labels and test-time adaptation while maintaining temporally consistent predictions over video streams. In practice, both domain shift and temporal-sampling shift break correspondence-based propagation and fixed-stride temporal aggregation, causing severe frame-to-frame flicker even in label-stable regions. We propose Time2General, a DGVSS framework built on Stability Queries. Time2General introduces a Spatio-Temporal Memory Decoder that aggregates multi-frame context into a clip-level spatio-temporal memory and decodes temporally consistent per-frame masks without explicit correspondence propagation. To further suppress flicker and improve robustness to varying sampling rates, the Masked Temporal Consistency Loss is proposed to regularize temporal prediction discrepancies across different strides, and randomize training strides to expose the model to diverse temporal gaps. Extensive experiments on multiple driving benchmarks show that Time2General achieves a substantial improvement in cross-domain accuracy and temporal stability over prior DGSS and VSS baselines while running at up to 18 FPS. Code will be released after the review process.
tldr: The paper introduces Time2General, a domain-generalized video semantic segmentation framework that uses a spatio-temporal memory decoder and masked temporal consistency loss to improve cross-domain accuracy and temporal stability, reducing frame-to-frame flicker in video semantic segmentation without test-time adaptation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Time2General的领域泛化视频语义分割框架。它使用时空记忆解码器和掩蔽时序一致性损失来提高跨域准确性和时序稳定性，从而减少视频语义分割中逐帧闪烁，且无需测试时自适应。
summary_zh: 领域泛化视频语义分割（DGVSS）在一个带标注的驾驶领域上进行训练，并在没有目标标签和测试时自适应的情况下直接部署到未见过的领域，同时保持视频流上时间上一致的预测。 实践中，领域偏移和时间采样偏移都会破坏基于对应关系的传播和固定步长的时间聚合，即使在标签稳定的区域也会导致严重的帧间闪烁。我们提出了Time2General，一个建立在稳定性查询上的DGVSS框架。 Time2General引入了一个时空记忆解码器，将多帧上下文聚合到一个片段级别的时空记忆中，并解码时间上一致的逐帧掩码，而无需显式地进行对应关系传播。 为了进一步抑制闪烁并提高对不同采样率的鲁棒性，我们提出了掩码时间一致性损失，以规范跨不同步长的时间预测差异，并随机化训练步长，使模型暴露于不同的时间间隔。 在多个驾驶基准测试上的大量实验表明，Time2General在跨域准确率和时间稳定性方面都比之前的 DGSS 和 VSS 基线有了显著提高，同时运行速度高达 18 FPS。代码将在评审过程结束后发布。

title: Energy-Efficient Fast Object Detection on Edge Devices for IoT Systems
summary: This paper presents an Internet of Things (IoT) application that utilizes an AI classifier for fast-object detection using the frame difference method. This method, with its shorter duration, is the most efficient and suitable for fast-object detection in IoT systems, which require energy-efficient applications compared to end-to-end methods. We have implemented this technique on three edge devices: AMD AlveoT M U50, Jetson Orin Nano, and Hailo-8T M AI Accelerator, and four models with artificial neural networks and transformer models. We examined various classes, including birds, cars, trains, and airplanes. Using the frame difference method, the MobileNet model consistently has high accuracy, low latency, and is highly energy-efficient. YOLOX consistently shows the lowest accuracy, lowest latency, and lowest efficiency. The experimental results show that the proposed algorithm has improved the average accuracy gain by 28.314%, the average efficiency gain by 3.6 times, and the average latency reduction by 39.305% compared to the end-to-end method. Of all these classes, the faster objects are trains and airplanes. Experiments show that the accuracy percentage for trains and airplanes is lower than other categories. So, in tasks that require fast detection and accurate results, end-to-end methods can be a disaster because they cannot handle fast object detection. To improve computational efficiency, we designed our proposed method as a lightweight detection algorithm. It is well suited for applications in IoT systems, especially those that require fast-moving object detection and higher accuracy.
tldr: The paper presents an energy-efficient object detection method using frame differencing on edge devices for IoT systems, demonstrating improved accuracy, efficiency, and latency compared to end-to-end methods, especially for fast-moving objects.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种在边缘设备上使用帧差法的节能目标检测方法，用于物联网系统，与端到端方法相比，该方法在精度、效率和延迟方面均有所提高，尤其是在快速移动的物体上。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种物联网(IoT)应用，该应用利用人工智能(AI)分类器，通过帧差法进行快速目标检测。相较于端到端方法，该方法耗时更短，对于需要节能型应用的物联网系统来说，是最有效和最适合的快速目标检测方法。 我们在三个边缘设备上实现了该技术：AMD AlveoT M U50、Jetson Orin Nano 和 Hailo-8T M AI 加速器，以及四个基于人工神经网络和 Transformer 模型的模型。我们考察了多种类别，包括鸟类、汽车、火车和飞机。在使用帧差法时，MobileNet 模型始终具有高精度、低延迟和高能效。YOLOX 则始终表现出最低的精度、最低的延迟和最低的效率。 实验结果表明，与端到端方法相比，所提出的算法平均精度增益提高了 28.314%，平均效率增益提高了 3.6 倍，平均延迟降低了 39.305%。在所有这些类别中，速度较快的物体是火车和飞机。实验表明，火车和飞机的准确率百分比低于其他类别。因此，在需要快速检测和准确结果的任务中，端到端方法可能会成为灾难，因为它们无法处理快速目标检测。为了提高计算效率，我们将提出的方法设计为一种轻量级检测算法。它非常适合物联网系统中的应用，特别是那些需要快速移动物体检测和更高精度的应用。

title: Raster2Seq: Polygon Sequence Generation for Floorplan Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing a structured vector-graphics representation from a rasterized floorplan image is typically an important prerequisite for computational tasks involving floorplans such as automated understanding or CAD workflows. However, existing techniques struggle in faithfully generating the structure and semantics conveyed by complex floorplans that depict large indoor spaces with many rooms and a varying numbers of polygon corners. To this end, we propose Raster2Seq, framing floorplan reconstruction as a sequence-to-sequence task in which floorplan elements--such as rooms, windows, and doors--are represented as labeled polygon sequences that jointly encode geometry and semantics. Our approach introduces an autoregressive decoder that learns to predict the next corner conditioned on image features and previously generated corners using guidance from learnable anchors. These anchors represent spatial coordinates in image space, hence allowing for effectively directing the attention mechanism to focus on informative image regions. By embracing the autoregressive mechanism, our method offers flexibility in the output format, enabling for efficiently handling complex floorplans with numerous rooms and diverse polygon structures. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks such as Structure3D, CubiCasa5K, and Raster2Graph, while also demonstrating strong generalization to more challenging datasets like WAFFLE, which contain diverse room structures and complex geometric variations.
tldr: The paper introduces Raster2Seq, a sequence-to-sequence model for reconstructing floorplans from raster images by predicting polygon sequences, achieving state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks and demonstrating generalization to more challenging datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Raster2Seq，一个序列到序列模型，用于从栅格图像重建楼层平面图，通过预测多边形序列，在标准基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，并展示了对更具挑战性的数据集的泛化能力。
summary_zh: 从栅格化的平面图图像中重建结构化的矢量图形表示通常是平面图计算任务（如自动理解或CAD工作流程）的重要先决条件。然而，现有技术难以忠实地生成复杂平面图所传达的结构和语义，这些平面图描绘了具有多个房间和不同数量的多边形角点的大型室内空间。为此，我们提出了Raster2Seq，将平面图重建定义为一个序列到序列的任务，其中平面图元素（如房间、窗户和门）被表示为带标签的多边形序列，这些序列共同编码几何形状和语义。我们的方法引入了一个自回归解码器，该解码器学习预测下一个角点，该预测以图像特征和先前生成的角点为条件，并利用可学习锚点的引导。这些锚点代表图像空间中的空间坐标，因此可以有效地指导注意力机制专注于信息丰富的图像区域。通过采用自回归机制，我们的方法在输出格式上提供了灵活性，从而能够有效地处理具有大量房间和各种多边形结构的复杂平面图。我们的方法在Structure3D、CubiCasa5K和Raster2Graph等标准基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，同时还展示了对更具挑战性的数据集（如WAFFLE）的强大泛化能力，WAFFLE包含各种房间结构和复杂的几何变化。

title: Basic Legibility Protocols Improve Trusted Monitoring
summary:
The AI Control research agenda aims to develop control protocols: safety techniques that prevent untrusted AI systems from taking harmful actions during deployment. Because human oversight is expensive, one approach is trusted monitoring, where weaker, trusted models oversee stronger, untrusted models$\unicode{x2013}$but this often fails when the untrusted model's actions exceed the monitor's comprehension. We introduce legibility protocols, which encourage the untrusted model to take actions that are easier for a monitor to evaluate.
  We perform control evaluations in the APPS coding setting, where an adversarial agent attempts to write backdoored code without detection. We study legibility protocols that allow the untrusted model to thoroughly document its code with comments$\unicode{x2013}$in contrast to prior work, which removed comments to prevent deceptive ones. We find that: (i) commenting protocols improve safety without sacrificing task performance relative to comment-removal baselines; (ii) commenting disproportionately benefits honest code, which typically has a natural explanation that resolves monitor suspicion, whereas backdoored code frequently lacks an easy justification; (iii) gains from commenting increase with monitor strength, as stronger monitors better distinguish genuine justifications from only superficially plausible ones.
tldr: This paper explores the use of 'legibility protocols,' specifically encouraging code commenting, to improve the safety of untrusted AI systems under trusted monitoring, showing it improves safety in an adversarial code-writing setting without sacrificing performance.
tldr_zh: 本文探索了“可读性协议”，特别是鼓励代码注释，以提高在可信监控下不受信任的 AI 系统的安全性，表明它在对抗性代码编写环境中提高了安全性，且不牺牲性能。
summary_zh:
AI控制研究议程旨在开发控制协议：即在部署期间防止不受信任的AI系统采取有害行动的安全技术。 由于人工监督成本高昂，一种方法是可信监控，即由较弱的、可信的模型监督较强的、不受信任的模型——但当不受信任的模型的行动超出监控器的理解范围时，这种方法通常会失效。我们引入了可读性协议，鼓励不受信任的模型采取更容易被监控器评估的行动。

我们在APPS编码环境中进行控制评估，其中对抗性代理试图编写后门代码而不被检测到。 我们研究了允许不受信任的模型使用注释来彻底记录其代码的可读性协议——这与先前移除注释以防止欺骗性注释的工作相反。 我们发现：（i）相对于移除注释的基线，注释协议在不牺牲任务性能的情况下提高了安全性；（ii）注释不成比例地有利于诚实代码，诚实代码通常具有自然的解释，可以消除监控器的疑虑，而后门代码通常缺乏容易的理由；（iii）注释带来的收益随着监控器强度的增加而增加，因为更强的监控器可以更好地区分真正的理由和仅表面上合理的理由。

title: Acoustic Drone Package Delivery Detection
summary: In recent years, the illicit use of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) for deliveries in restricted area such as prisons became a significant security challenge. While numerous studies have focused on UAV detection or localization, little attention has been given to delivery events identification. This study presents the first acoustic package delivery detection algorithm using a ground-based microphone array. The proposed method estimates both the drone's propeller speed and the delivery event using solely acoustic features. A deep neural network detects the presence of a drone and estimates the propeller's rotation speed or blade passing frequency (BPF) from a mel spectrogram. The algorithm analyzes the BPFs to identify probable delivery moments based on sudden changes before and after a specific time. Results demonstrate a mean absolute error of the blade passing frequency estimator of 16 Hz when the drone is less than 150 meters away from the microphone array. The drone presence detection estimator has a accuracy of 97%. The delivery detection algorithm correctly identifies 96% of events with a false positive rate of 8%. This study shows that deliveries can be identified using acoustic signals up to a range of 100 meters.
tldr: This paper presents a deep learning based acoustic method for detecting drone package delivery events using microphone arrays, achieving high accuracy in drone presence and delivery event detection.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的声学方法，利用麦克风阵列检测无人机包裹投递事件，在无人机存在检测和投递事件检测方面均实现了较高的准确率。
summary_zh: 近年来，在监狱等限制区域非法使用无人机（UAV）进行投递已成为一项重大的安全挑战。虽然大量研究集中于无人机的检测或定位，但对投递事件的识别却鲜有关注。本研究提出了一种使用地面麦克风阵列的首个声学包裹投递检测算法。所提出的方法仅使用声学特征来估计无人机的螺旋桨转速和投递事件。一个深度神经网络从梅尔频谱图检测无人机的存在并估计螺旋桨转速或叶片通过频率（BPF）。该算法分析BPF，以识别特定时间前后发生突变时可能的投递时刻。结果表明，当无人机距离麦克风阵列小于150米时，叶片通过频率估计器的平均绝对误差为16 Hz。无人机存在检测估计器的准确率为97%。投递检测算法正确识别了96%的事件，假阳性率为8%。本研究表明，可以在100米范围内使用声学信号识别投递行为。

title: Optimal Control of Microswimmers for Trajectory Tracking Using Bayesian Optimization
summary: Trajectory tracking for microswimmers remains a key challenge in microrobotics, where low-Reynolds-number dynamics make control design particularly complex. In this work, we formulate the trajectory tracking problem as an optimal control problem and solve it using a combination of B-spline parametrization with Bayesian optimization, allowing the treatment of high computational costs without requiring complex gradient computations. Applied to a flagellated magnetic swimmer, the proposed method reproduces a variety of target trajectories, including biologically inspired paths observed in experimental studies. We further evaluate the approach on a three-sphere swimmer model, demonstrating that it can adapt to and partially compensate for wall-induced hydrodynamic effects. The proposed optimization strategy can be applied consistently across models of different fidelity, from low-dimensional ODE-based models to high-fidelity PDE-based simulations, showing its robustness and generality. These results highlight the potential of Bayesian optimization as a versatile tool for optimal control strategies in microscale locomotion under complex fluid-structure interactions.
tldr: This paper presents a Bayesian optimization approach for trajectory tracking of microswimmers, demonstrating its effectiveness on two swimmer models and its adaptability to different simulation fidelities.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的微型游泳器轨迹跟踪方法，并在两种游泳器模型上展示了其有效性，以及对不同仿真保真度的适应性。
summary_zh: 微型游泳器的轨迹跟踪仍然是微型机器人领域的一项关键挑战，在低雷诺数动力学环境下，控制设计尤为复杂。在这项工作中，我们将轨迹跟踪问题建模为一个最优控制问题，并结合B样条参数化与贝叶斯优化进行求解，从而能够在无需复杂梯度计算的情况下处理高计算成本。应用于一种鞭毛磁性游泳器，所提出的方法能够复现多种目标轨迹，包括实验研究中观察到的生物启发路径。我们进一步在一个三球游泳器模型上评估了该方法，证明它能够适应并部分补偿壁面引起的流体动力学效应。所提出的优化策略能够一致地应用于不同精度级别的模型，从低维基于常微分方程的模型到高精度基于偏微分方程的仿真，展现了其鲁棒性和通用性。这些结果突显了贝叶斯优化作为一种多功能工具在复杂流固耦合作用下微尺度运动最优控制策略中的潜力。

title: Bladder Vessel Segmentation using a Hybrid Attention-Convolution Framework
summary: Urinary bladder cancer surveillance requires tracking tumor sites across repeated interventions, yet the deformable and hollow bladder lacks stable landmarks for orientation. While blood vessels visible during endoscopy offer a patient-specific "vascular fingerprint" for navigation, automated segmentation is challenged by imperfect endoscopic data, including sparse labels, artifacts like bubbles or variable lighting, continuous deformation, and mucosal folds that mimic vessels. State-of-the-art vessel segmentation methods often fail to address these domain-specific complexities. We introduce a Hybrid Attention-Convolution (HAC) architecture that combines Transformers to capture global vessel topology prior with a CNN that learns a residual refinement map to precisely recover thin-vessel details. To prioritize structural connectivity, the Transformer is trained on optimized ground truth data that exclude short and terminal branches. Furthermore, to address data scarcity, we employ a physics-aware pretraining, that is a self-supervised strategy using clinically grounded augmentations on unlabeled data. Evaluated on the BlaVeS dataset, consisting of endoscopic video frames, our approach achieves high accuracy (0.94) and superior precision (0.61) and clDice (0.66) compared to state-of-the-art medical segmentation models. Crucially, our method successfully suppresses false positives from mucosal folds that dynamically appear and vanish as the bladder fills and empties during surgery. Hence, HAC provides the reliable structural stability required for clinical navigation.
tldr: The paper introduces a Hybrid Attention-Convolution (HAC) network for bladder vessel segmentation, combining Transformers and CNNs with physics-aware pretraining to overcome the challenges of noisy endoscopic data and enable reliable clinical navigation via vascular fingerprinting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种混合注意力卷积 (HAC) 网络，用于膀胱血管分割，它结合了 Transformer 和 CNN，并使用物理感知的预训练来克服内窥镜数据噪声带来的挑战，并通过血管指纹实现可靠的临床导航。
summary_zh: 膀胱癌的监视需要跟踪重复干预过程中的肿瘤位置，然而，可变形的空腔膀胱缺乏用于定位的稳定地标。虽然内窥镜检查中可见的血管为导航提供了患者特异性的“血管指纹”，但由于内窥镜数据的不完善，包括稀疏标签、气泡或可变光照等伪影、持续变形以及模仿血管的黏膜皱襞，使得自动分割面临挑战。最先进的血管分割方法通常无法解决这些特定领域的复杂性。我们引入了一种混合注意力-卷积（HAC）架构，该架构结合了Transformer来捕捉全局血管拓扑先验，以及CNN来学习残差细化图，从而精确地恢复细血管细节。为了优先考虑结构连接性，Transformer在经过优化的真实标签数据上进行训练，该数据排除了短的和末端的血管分支。此外，为了解决数据稀缺的问题，我们采用了一种物理感知预训练，即一种使用临床基础增强技术在未标记数据上进行的自监督策略。在由内窥镜视频帧组成的BlaVeS数据集上进行评估，与最先进的医学分割模型相比，我们的方法实现了高精度（0.94）和卓越的精确率（0.61）和clDice（0.66）。至关重要的是，我们的方法成功抑制了黏膜皱襞产生的假阳性，而这些黏膜皱襞会在手术过程中随着膀胱的充盈和排空而动态地出现和消失。因此，HAC提供了临床导航所需的可靠结构稳定性。

title: Symbolic Pattern Temporal Numeric Planning with Intermediate Conditions and Effects
summary: Recently, a Symbolic Pattern Planning (SPP) approach was proposed for numeric planning where a pattern (i.e., a finite sequence of actions) suggests a causal order between actions. The pattern is then encoded in a SMT formula whose models correspond to valid plans. If the suggestion by the pattern is inaccurate and no valid plan can be found, the pattern is extended until it contains the causal order of actions in a valid plan, making the approach complete. In this paper, we extend the SPP approach to the temporal planning with Intermediate Conditions and Effects (ICEs) fragment, where $(i)$ actions are durative (and thus can overlap over time) and have conditions/effects which can be checked/applied at any time during an action's execution, and $(ii)$ one can specify plan's conditions/effects that must be checked/applied at specific times during the plan execution. Experimental results show that our SPP planner Patty $(i)$ outperforms all other planners in the literature in the majority of temporal domains without ICEs, $(ii)$ obtains comparable results with the SoTA search planner for ICS in literature domains with ICEs, and $(iii)$ outperforms the same planner in a novel domain based on a real-world application.
tldr: This paper extends Symbolic Pattern Planning (SPP) to handle temporal planning with intermediate conditions and effects (ICEs), demonstrating strong performance against other planners in various domains.
tldr_zh: 本文将符号模式规划（SPP）扩展到处理具有中间条件和效果（ICE）的时间规划，并在各种领域中展示了相对于其他规划器的强大性能。
summary_zh: 最近，一种符号模式规划（SPP）方法被提出用于数值规划，其中模式（即，一个有限的动作序列）暗示了动作之间的因果顺序。然后，该模式被编码成一个SMT公式，其模型对应于有效的计划。如果该模式的建议不准确且无法找到有效的计划，则扩展该模式，直到它包含有效计划中动作的因果顺序，从而使该方法完整。在本文中，我们将SPP方法扩展到具有中间条件和效果（ICEs）片段的时序规划，其中$(i)$动作是持续的（因此可以在时间上重叠），并且具有可以在动作执行期间的任何时间检查/应用的条件/效果，并且$(ii)$可以指定计划的条件/效果，必须在计划执行期间的特定时间检查/应用。实验结果表明，我们的SPP规划器Patty：$(i)$在大多数没有ICEs的时序领域中，优于文献中的所有其他规划器，$(ii)$在文献中具有ICEs的ICS领域中，获得了与SoTA搜索规划器相当的结果，并且$(iii)$在一个基于真实世界应用的新领域中，优于同一规划器。

title: A Systematic Review on Data-Driven Brain Deformation Modeling for Image-Guided Neurosurgery
summary: Accurate compensation of brain deformation is a critical challenge for reliable image-guided neurosurgery, as surgical manipulation and tumor resection induce tissue motion that misaligns preoperative planning images with intraoperative anatomy and longitudinal studies. In this systematic review, we synthesize recent AI-driven approaches developed between January 2020 and April 2025 for modeling and correcting brain deformation. A comprehensive literature search was conducted in PubMed, IEEE Xplore, Scopus, and Web of Science, with predefined inclusion and exclusion criteria focused on computational methods applied to brain deformation compensation for neurosurgical imaging, resulting in 41 studies meeting these criteria. We provide a unified analysis of methodological strategies, including deep learning-based image registration, direct deformation field regression, synthesis-driven multimodal alignment, resection-aware architectures addressing missing correspondences, and hybrid models that integrate biomechanical priors. We also examine dataset utilization, reported evaluation metrics, validation protocols, and how uncertainty and generalization have been assessed across studies. While AI-based deformation models demonstrate promising performance and computational efficiency, current approaches exhibit limitations in out-of-distribution robustness, standardized benchmarking, interpretability, and readiness for clinical deployment. Our review highlights these gaps and outlines opportunities for future research aimed at achieving more robust, generalizable, and clinically translatable deformation compensation solutions for neurosurgical guidance. By organizing recent advances and critically evaluating evaluation practices, this work provides a comprehensive foundation for researchers and clinicians engaged in developing and applying AI-based brain deformation methods.
tldr: This systematic review examines AI-driven approaches for modeling and correcting brain deformation in image-guided neurosurgery, highlighting limitations and future research directions for improved robustness and clinical translation.
tldr_zh: 该系统性综述考察了人工智能驱动的脑组织变形建模和校正方法在图像引导神经外科中的应用，强调了现有方法的局限性以及未来提高鲁棒性和临床转化性的研究方向。
summary_zh:
摘要：
脑形变的精确补偿是实现可靠的图像引导神经外科的关键挑战，因为手术操作和肿瘤切除会引起组织运动，导致术前计划图像与术中解剖结构和纵向研究发生错位。在本系统综述中，我们总结了2020年1月至2025年4月期间开发的、用于建模和校正脑形变的最新人工智能驱动方法。在PubMed、IEEE Xplore、Scopus和 Web of Science中进行了全面的文献搜索，采用了预定义的纳入和排除标准，重点关注应用于神经外科成像的脑形变补偿的计算方法，最终有41项研究符合这些标准。我们对方法学策略进行了统一分析，包括基于深度学习的图像配准、直接形变场回归、合成驱动的多模态对齐、解决缺失对应关系的切除感知架构，以及整合生物力学先验知识的混合模型。我们还 بررسی 了数据集的使用、报告的评估指标、验证协议，以及研究中不确定性和泛化能力的评估方式。尽管基于人工智能的形变模型表现出令人鼓舞的性能和计算效率，但目前的方法在分布外鲁棒性、标准化基准测试、可解释性以及临床部署的准备程度方面存在局限性。我们的综述突出了这些差距，并概述了未来研究的机会，旨在实现更鲁棒、更具泛化能力和临床转化能力的形变补偿解决方案，以用于神经外科指导。通过整理最新进展并批判性地评估评估实践，这项工作为从事开发和应用基于人工智能的脑形变方法的研究人员和临床医生提供了全面的基础。

title: First-order friction models with bristle dynamics: lumped and distributed formulations
summary: Dynamic models, particularly rate-dependent models, have proven effective in capturing the key phenomenological features of frictional processes, whilst also possessing important mathematical properties that facilitate the design of control and estimation algorithms. However, many rate-dependent formulations are built on empirical considerations, whereas physical derivations may offer greater interpretability. In this context, starting from fundamental physical principles, this paper introduces a novel class of first-order dynamic friction models that approximate the dynamics of a bristle element by inverting the friction characteristic. Amongst the developed models, a specific formulation closely resembling the LuGre model is derived using a simple rheological equation for the bristle element. This model is rigorously analyzed in terms of stability and passivity -- important properties that support the synthesis of observers and controllers. Furthermore, a distributed version, formulated as a hyperbolic partial differential equation (PDE), is presented, which enables the modeling of frictional processes commonly encountered in rolling contact phenomena. The tribological behavior of the proposed description is evaluated through classical experiments and validated against the response predicted by the LuGre model, revealing both notable similarities and key differences.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel class of first-order dynamic friction models derived from physical principles, including a formulation resembling the LuGre model, along with stability analysis and a distributed version for rolling contact. It's about physics-based friction modeling.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于物理原理的新型一阶动态摩擦模型，其中包括一个类似于LuGre模型的公式，以及稳定性分析和一个用于滚动接触的分布式版本。 主要是关于基于物理的摩擦建模。
summary_zh: 动态模型，特别是与速率相关的模型，已被证明能有效捕捉摩擦过程的关键现象学特征，同时还具备重要的数学性质，有助于控制和估计算法的设计。然而，许多与速率相关的公式是建立在经验性考虑之上，而物理推导可能提供更强的可解释性。在此背景下，本文从基本物理原理出发，提出了一种新型的一阶动态摩擦模型，该模型通过反转摩擦特性来近似模拟鬃毛单元的动力学行为。在所提出的模型中，使用鬃毛单元的简单流变学方程推导出了一种与LuGre模型非常相似的特定公式。本文对该模型的稳定性和无源性进行了严格分析——这些重要性质支持观测器和控制器的综合。此外，还提出了一种分布式版本，以双曲型偏微分方程(PDE) 形式表示，该版本能够模拟滚动接触现象中常见的摩擦过程。通过经典实验评估了所提出的描述的摩擦学行为，并根据LuGre模型预测的响应进行了验证，揭示了显著的相似之处和关键差异。

title: Disambiguating Anthropomorphism and Anthropomimesis in Human-Robot Interaction
summary: In this preliminary work, we offer an initial disambiguation of the theoretical concepts anthropomorphism and anthropomimesis in Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) and social robotics. We define anthropomorphism as users perceiving human-like qualities in robots, and anthropomimesis as robot developers designing human-like features into robots. This contribution aims to provide a clarification and exploration of these concepts for future HRI scholarship, particularly regarding the party responsible for human-like qualities - robot perceiver for anthropomorphism, and robot designer for anthropomimesis. We provide this contribution so that researchers can build on these disambiguated theoretical concepts for future robot design and evaluation.
tldr: This paper differentiates between anthropomorphism (user perception of human-like qualities in robots) and anthropomimesis (developers designing human-like features into robots) in HRI, aiming to clarify these concepts for future research and robot design.
tldr_zh: 本文区分了人机交互中拟人化（用户感知机器人中类人特征）和拟人模仿（开发者将类人特征设计到机器人中）的概念，旨在为未来的研究和机器人设计明确这些概念。
summary_zh: 在这项初步工作中，我们对人机交互 (HRI) 和社会机器人领域中理论概念的人格化 (anthropomorphism) 和拟人模仿 (anthropomimesis) 进行了初步的区分。我们将人格化定义为用户在机器人身上感知到类人特质，并将拟人模仿定义为机器人开发者将类人特征设计到机器人中。这项贡献旨在为未来的HRI研究提供这些概念的澄清和探索，特别是在类人特质的责任方方面——人格化对应的是机器人的感知者，而拟人模仿对应的是机器人的设计者。我们提供这项贡献的目的是为了使研究人员能够在这些消歧后的理论概念基础上，进行未来的机器人设计和评估。
